words.context: A reduced vowel is a vowel sound that is weak and not clear, often used in unstressed syllables.
The combination of letters O and W in the word vowel are pronounced as an O sound. Vowel.

In the word common, the first O is stressed. It's a strong vowel. It's pronounced either as a long O in American English. Common. Or as a short O sound in British English. Common. Whereas the second O is reduced.
The first A and the last A are reduced vowels. They are in a weak position, which means they are not stressed, so they lose their full quality.
R-colored vowels are vowel sounds that change when the letter R comes right after them in the same syllable. So the vowel and R are pronounced together as one special sound.
Some other words from this set and the previous vocabulary set with R-colored vowels include flavor, matter, observe, surface, measure and nuclear.
Some other words from this set and the previous vocabulary set with R-colored vowels include flavor, matter, observe, surface, measure and nuclear.
The next word is observe, it's spelled as O-b-s-e-r-v-e. And the last word is measure, which translates into Russian as Izmiret.
And the last word is measure, which translates into Russian as Izmiret.
To conduct studies means to perform individual investigations on a subject.
Please write down the word studies, which is spelled as S-T-U-D-I-E-S.
To conduct research means to investigate using a systematic approach. How do you spell research? It's R-E-S-E-A-R-C-H.
Matter as a noun is physical substance, material, in other words stuff. The verb to matter means to be important.
The noun trace is a mark or sign left by something. And the second meaning is to draw or copy a shape by showing the main or outer lines.
To interact means to do something together with someone or something else. Or to communicate.
The noun is interaction. Interaction translates as взаимодействие.
And the adjective interactive means involving active participation.
Was long thought to be.
Long. Long thought to be.
Thought to be.
To be. Thought to be.
The neutrino is so named because it is electrically neutral and because its rest mass is so small that it was long thought to be zero.
The neutrino is so named because it is electrically neutral.
The neutrino is so named because it is electrically neutral and because its rest mass is so small that it was long thought to be zero.
The rest mass. The first E in rest sounds very much like the Russian E.
The rest mass. The second word is M-A-S-S.
Gravity keeps us on earth. The spelling is G-R-A-V-I-T-Y and it translates into Russian as gravitation.
Abundant means more than enough, present in large quantities.
There's an abundance of information online.
To pass through means to go from one side to the other. Light can pass through glass.
The noun moderation means balance. It's when you avoid the extremes.
Entire is an adjective which translates into Russian as «целый». The adverb is entirely. The R is not pronounced in the British variant.
The adverb entirely means completely. In the parentheses note that it's an adverb. You can use the abbreviation for adverb which is ADV.
The noun entirety means the whole thing. And finally the expression even an entire planet means surprisingly a whole planet.
To oscillate is a verb, глагол, which translates into Russian as колебаться. The noun is oscillation.
Oscillation translates into Russian as колебание-асцеляция. And finally the expression neutrino oscillation translates into Russian as нейтринные асцеляции.
Please write down the expression neutrino oscillation. How do you spell that? It's N-E-U-T-R-I-N-O for neutrino and the spelling of oscillation is O-S-C-I-L-L-A-T-I-O-N.
Фотон – маленький партикль светлого. Фотон – путешествие по скорости светлого. Нейтриноз – второй обundантный партикль в мире после партиклей светлого, называемых фотонами.
A tiny particle of light. How do you spell tiny? It's t-i-n-y, which means very small.
A quark is a small particle that makes up protons and neutrons.
To evolve means to develop or change slowly. Evolutionary biology is the scientific study of the way in which populations of living things change and develop over time.
A typical college student averages two to three hours of independent studying per night during the academic semester. On average, it takes an hour to finish the test.
Flavor is a noun. Which translates into Russian as аромат, вкус, оттенок. And here is the expression neutrino flavors, which translates into Russian as нейтриные ароматы.
Neutrinos do not stay the same. They change types all the time. In other words, they oscillate from one type to another. An electron neutrino can become a muon neutrino or a tau neutrino.
There are three types of neutrinos or three flavors of neutrinos. The electron neutrino, the muon neutrino, and the tau neutrino.
There are three types of neutrinos or three flavors of neutrinos. The electron neutrino, the muon neutrino, and the tau neutrino.
There are three types of neutrinos or three flavors of neutrinos. The electron neutrino, the muon neutrino, and the tau neutrino.
